op.CATCHER.potential.1.event.description.text: Battle skill Rigid Interdiction and ultimate Textbook Assault improved: After hitting the enemy, deals another strike that deals [300 + DEF×5.0] of Physical DMG.

op.CATCHER.potential.3.event.description.text: Combo skill Timely Suppression improved: Shield duration +5s.

op.CATCHER.potential.4.event.description.text: Ultimate Textbook Assault improved: Ultimate Energy cost -{1-costValue:0%}.

op.CATCHER.potential.5.event.description.text: Battle skill Rigid Interdiction improved: Hitting an enemy while the shield is active returns 10 SP.

op.CATCHER.skill.RIGID_INTERDICTION.even.text:
Raises a shield that can block attacks, grants Protection to self and nearby operators, and immediately returns some SP. 
When attacked while the said shield is raised, perform a retaliation bash that deals Physical DMG and applies 1 stack of Vulnerability to the attacking enemy.

op.CATCHER.skill.RIGID_INTERDICTION_BASI.text: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals {poise:0} Stagger.
Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies.
Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

op.CATCHER.skill.TEXTBOOK_ASSAULT.event..text: Swings the greatsword to perform 2 consecutive slashes to deal Physical DMG and apply Weakness, followed by a powerful downward slam that deals massive Physical DMG and applies Knock Down to all enemies within the area of effect.

op.CATCHER.skill.TIMELY_SUPPRESSION.even.text: When an enemy starts charging up a skill, or when the controlled operator is attacked and falls below {trigger_hp_ratio:0%} HP. A powerful downward punch that deals Physical DMG to the enemy, while granting shields to self and another teammate (controlled operator prioritized). DEF can further increase Shield points.

op.CATCHER.status.RIGID_INTERDICTION_RET.text: While the Rigid Interdiction shield is up, retaliates against attackers with Physical DMG, Vulnerable infliction, and stagger via Rigid Interdiction Retaliation Burst. P5+ also returns Skill Points on each retaliation.
Single retaliation hit fired by Rigid Interdiction Retaliation. Deals Physical DMG, applies Vulnerable infliction and stagger. P1+ adds a DEF-scaling bonus strike at +0.1s. P5+ returns Skill Points.

op.CATCHER.talent.COMPREHENSIVE_MINDSET_.text: Ultimate Textbook Assault improved: Final hit creates 2/3 shockwave(s) at talent level 1/2, each dealing 30%/45% ATK of Physical DMG.
